title: Experienced Backend Engineer
score_reasoning: Your experience with Python and Go distributed systems is a strong foundation, but Taboola's primary stack centers on Java and Spring, which you don't have commercial experience with—this represents a significant core tech gap and limits your ability to hit the ground running. The role itself (titled 'Experienced') aligns with your current mid-to-senior level, but the on-site requirement in Tel Aviv, Israel (9+ hours ahead of Berlin) creates a hard location barrier that conflicts with your remote-first preference and ±2h timezone overlap requirement. While the high-scale distributed systems work (140TB/day, real-time big data) matches your career goals, the location mismatch and Java/Spring requirement together disqualify this role from serious consideration.

red_flags: Primary language is Java/Spring; you have no commercial Java experience
On-site only in Tel Aviv, Israel—9+ hour timezone difference from Berlin
No explicit remote option despite hybrid being mentioned in benefits
Hybrid is anchored to Tel Aviv office, not Berlin
